arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta returns from visit to owners to ignite Arsenal’s title challenge
arts.sum: ‘Only one way to fulfil expectation – win big trophies’ Saka and Rice back for Forest visit but Ben White out Mikel Arteta returned from a visit to see Arsenal’s owners over the international break determined to turn up the temperature and ignite his side’s stuttering title challenge. The head coach was in an animated mood as he warmed up for a crucial run of fixtures, with the emphasis on playing with fire in the belly in Saturday afternoon’s home game against Nottingham Forest. arts.ttl: Newcastle ready to swoop for winger courted by Liverpool and Arsenal
arts.sum: Newcastle United are considering a January bid for exciting Belgian winger Johan Bakayoko, according to reports. The Magpies have been on the lookout for reinforcements in wide positions for some time now, especially with Miguel Almiron likely to leave the club soon. arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Ben White injury, Guardiola, transfer meeting, Edu replacement
arts.sum: The way I saw the team in the last 48 hours gives me a lot of confidence that tomorrow we're going to be full tilt to try and win the game. Getting back to back wins will create the energy and belief that that we need, and a lot of the good things that we are doing
